examples: She moved the sheaf of papers into position.
He took out a sheaf of papers and leafed through them.
The sergeant threw the frayed sheaf of football-pool coupons aside and snatched the radio. He saluted smartly, his huge belly juggling like a water gourd.
But I do get a press card, and a sheaf of print-outs from various parties and candidates.
Is it any wonder that you cant leave a doctors office in Tokyo without a sheaf of prescriptions?
